operations.command:
FRED_KEY=$(grep LIQUIDITY_FRED_API_KEY /media/sam/1TB/openbb_liquidity/.env | cut -d= -f2)
echo "LIQUIDITY_FRED_API_KEY=$FRED_KEY" >> /tmp/fred_append.txt
cd /media/sam/1TB && SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE=~/.config/sops/age/keys.txt sops -d .env.enc > /tmp/env_dec.txt && cat /tmp/fred_append.txt >> /tmp/env_dec.txt && SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE=~/.config/sops/age/keys.txt sops -e /tmp/env_dec.txt > .env.enc && rm /tmp/env_dec.txt /tmp/fred_append.txt && echo "FRED API key added to SOPS"
operations.description: Add FRED API key to SOPS properly

operations.command: head -5 /media/sam/1TB/.env.enc

cd /media/sam/1TB && FRED_KEY=$(grep LIQUIDITY_FRED_API_KEY /media/sam/1TB/openbb_liquidity/.env | cut -d= -f2) && SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE=~/.config/sops/age/keys.txt sops --input-type dotenv --output-type dotenv -d .env.enc > /tmp/env_plain.txt && echo "LIQUIDITY_FRED_API_KEY=$FRED_KEY" >> /tmp/env_plain.txt && SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE=~/.config/sops/age/keys.txt sops --input-type dotenv --output-type dotenv -e /tmp/env_plain.txt > .env.enc.new && mv .env.enc.new .env.enc && rm /tmp/env_plain.txt && echo "Done: FRED API key added to SOPS"

operations.old_string:
## Testing Requirements (MANDATORY)

**Ogni implementazione deve includere test:**

1. **Unit Tests*...

operations.command: git status --short
git diff --stat tests/

git add tests/integration/test_fed_custody.py tests/integration/test_risk_etfs.py tests/integration/test_stress.py tests/integration/test_tic.py && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
test(phase5): improve coverage with comprehensive tests

Coverage improvements for Phase 5 collectors:
- stress.py: 87% → 91%
- fed_custody.py: 66% → 89%
- risk_etfs.py: 85% (edge case tests added)
- cofer.py: 83%
- tic.py: 55% → 75%

New tests added:
- _find_date_column helper function tests
- YoY change calculation tests
- _normalize_major_holders parsing tests
- Risk appetite edge cases (empty, missing ETFs)
- Flow estimation edge cases
- Regime classification edge cases

All tests use real data via FRED API when available.
Tests: 135 passed, 1 skipped

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
git push origin main 2>&1 | head -20
